name: Chile Beer Damper
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon red chiles, such as piquins or jalapenos,
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all the ingredients together until well combined.
3. Spoon the mixture into a greased bread pan and smooth the top.
4. Bake for 1 hour, or until golden brown and the loaf appears done.
5. Cool on a rack.
Serving Suggestions: May be served topped with Chile Cream Cheese.
